caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, dated April 12, 2019, focusing on the topic of increasing the minimum wage (S.23). The scene is set in a conference room where several individuals, dressed in business attire, are seated around a table. Two men in suits are prominently featured in the foreground, engaged in discussion or listening attentively. Behind them, other attendees, including a woman in a black dress and a man in a suit, are also present, contributing to the professional atmosphere. The setting includes various office items such as water bottles, a coffee maker, and shelves with books and other materials, indicating a well-equipped workspace. The overall tone suggests a serious and structured discussion on legislative matters.
